unit.note: shared/tests/test_external_review_config.py: 24 existing + 10 new tests covering project_root deep-merge, sub-dict preservation, missing-file fallback, malformed-JSON fallback (with stderr), round-trip, cascade-helper defaults + independence from feedback_iterations.

integration.note: Full shared/tests/ suite (excluding 3 pre-existing fail suites). Up from 1252 because of 9 new external_review_config tests beyond the 1 existing baseline change.

smoke.note: Empirical end-to-end probe on shipwright self-adopted root: load_review_config(project_root='.') reads shipwright_iterate_config.json (written in ADR-032), returns merged config with feedback_iterations=0 (override), external_code_review.enabled=True (added). is_external_code_review_enabled = True; get_external_review_status = user_disabled. Confirms producer/consumer loop closed.

degraded.note: Pre-existing on main, same as iterate-2026-05-05-finalization-verifier-drop-dir and iterate-2026-05-05-adopt-iterate-config. Out of scope.
